title: Planting plans

areaValidation.remainingLimitTitle: The specified area exceeds this bed's available remaining area.
areaValidation.noRemainingTitle: No free area is available for this bed in the selected period.
areaValidation.bedLimitTitle: The specified area exceeds this bed's size.

tooltips.coupledFields: Area used: coupled with plant count. Changes automatically update the other value.
tooltips.areaAutoMax: Empty or "max" automatically uses the maximum available remaining area.
tooltips.areaInputTitle: Area occupied by this planting plan
tooltips.areaInputDescription: The area of the bed occupied by this planting plan. Changes to the area or plant count automatically update the other value. Empty or "max" uses the maximum available remaining area.
tooltips.plantsFromSpacing: Plant count: coupled with area used. Changes automatically update the other value.
tooltips.calculatedHarvestStartDate: Calculated automatically from the planting date and the culture's growth duration.
tooltips.calculatedHarvestEndDate: Calculated automatically from the harvest start and the culture's harvest duration.
tooltips.missingGrowthDuration: Cannot be calculated because this culture has no growth duration.
tooltips.missingHarvestDuration: Cannot be calculated because this culture has no harvest duration.
tooltips.missingGrowthAndHarvestDuration: Cannot be calculated because this culture has neither a growth duration nor a harvest duration.

validation.requiredFields: The following required fields must be filled in: {{fields}}
validation.areaExceedsRemaining: The specified area exceeds this bed's available remaining area.
validation.areaExceedsBedArea: The specified area exceeds this bed's size.
validation.noAvailableArea: No free area is available for this bed in the selected period anymore.

confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this planting plan?

areaAssignment.title: Change growing area
areaAssignment.hierarchyHint: Location filters fields, field filters beds.
areaAssignment.emptyStateDescription: Create fields and beds first before assigning an area to a planting plan.

mobile.emptyDescription: Create your first planting plan to manage culture, cultivation type, and time periods clearly on mobile.

emptyStates.createBlockedTooltip: Beds are added inside fields on the Fields & Beds page.

fields.title: You can't add a planting plan yet.
fields.description: Open Fields & Beds and add a field to the appropriate location there.

beds.title: You haven't created any beds yet.
beds.description: Beds are the foundation for planting plans. Open Fields & Beds and add a bed via a field.

cultures.title: You haven't created any cultures yet.
cultures.description: Cultures are required to create planting plans.

plans.title: You haven't created a planting plan yet.
plans.description: Create your first planting plan now.
